summary: Completed testing of Subscription Tiers and Kanban DnD features. Fixed critical bug where subscription was not loading due to wrong localStorage key ('token' instead of 'capymatch_token'). All backend APIs pass (9/9 tests). Frontend features verified working after fix.

issues: ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin errors for external university logo resources - not blocking functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription features fully working. Token key is 'capymatch_token'. Emma (athlete) has 12 schools on basic tier (limit 5). The Add School button on Pipeline page now correctly shows upgrade modal when at limit.

subscription_tiers: GET /api/subscription/tiers returns all 3 tiers (basic, pro, premium)
GET /api/subscription returns tier, label, price, features, limits, usage
Max schools: Starter=5, Pro=25, Premium=unlimited - VERIFIED
school_limit_enforcement: POST /api/knowledge-base/add-to-board returns 403 with subscription_limit when over limit
Error includes type='subscription_limit', message, current, limit, upgrade_to fields
kanban_dnd: All 6 stage mappings work: added, outreach, in_conversation, campus_visit, offer, committed

pipeline_page: Add School button (data-testid='add-school-btn') triggers upgrade modal when over limit
6 columns: Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offer, Committed
Cards show: school name, division tags, conference tags, match %, status dot
upgrade_modal: Upgrade modal (data-testid='upgrade-modal') appears on Add School click
3 tier cards: basic, pro, premium with correct pricing
'Most Popular' badge shown on Pro tier
Trigger message: 'You've reached your limit of 5 schools. Upgrade to add more.'
schools_page: Add to Board triggers 403 handling correctly
Upgrade modal appears with subscription_limit error

bug_fixed.issue: Subscription provider was using localStorage.getItem('token') instead of localStorage.getItem('capymatch_token')
bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'token' to 'capymatch_token' to match the actual localStorage key used by AuthContext
bug_fixed.impact: School limit badge now shows on Pipeline page, and Add School button now correctly triggers upgrade modal

mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: Clicking 'Upgrade to Pro' or 'Upgrade to Premium' shows toast 'Stripe checkout coming soon! Contact support to upgrade.'
